mapper.select: select id, title, summary, content, cover_image, category_id, author_id, status, is_top, view_count, publish_time, create_time, update_time from article where status = 1 order by is_top desc, publish_time desc, id desc
select id, title, summary, content, cover_image, category_id, author_id, status, is_top, view_count, publish_time, create_time, update_time from article where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into article ( title, summary, content, cover_image, category_id, author_id, status, is_top, view_count, publish_time ) values ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{categoryId}, #{authorId}, #{status}, #{isTop}, #{viewCount}, #{publishTime} )
mapper.update: update article set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, is_top = #{isTop}, publish_time = #{publishTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.cover_image, a.category_id, c.name as category_name, a.author_id, u.nickname as author_name, a.view_count, a.publish_time from article a left join category c on a.category_id = c.id left join user u on a.author_id = u.id where a.id = #{id} and a.status = 1 limit 1
select id, title, publish_time from article where status = 1 order by publish_time desc, id desc
